revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:Country data Wang Jingwei regime]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]

{{ {{{1<noinclude> |country showdata </noinclude>}}} | alias = Wang Jingwei regime | shortname alias = China | flag alias = Flag of the Republic of China-Nanjing (Peace, Anti-Communism, National Construction).svg | flag alias-1940 = Flag of the Republic of China-Nanjing (Peace, Anti-Communism, National Construction).svg | flag alias-1943 = Flag of the Republic of China.svg | link alias-army = Collaborationist Chinese Army | flag alias-naval = Flag of the Republic of China-Nanjing (War Ensign).svg | link alias-naval = Collaborationist Chinese Army | link alias-air force = Collaborationist Chinese Army | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} | altlink = {{{altlink|}}} | altvar = {{{altvar|}}} <noinclude> | var1 = 1940 | var2 = 1943 | related1 = Republic of China (1912–1949) | related2 = Republic of China | related3 = China </noinclude> }}<noinclude>
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
{{ {{{1<noinclude> |country showdata </noinclude>}}} | alias = Wang Jingwei regime | shortname alias = China | flag alias = Flag of the Republic of China-Nanjing (Peace, Anti-Communism, National Construction).svg | flag alias-1940 = Flag of the Republic of China-Nanjing (Peace, Anti-Communism, National Construction).svg | flag alias-1943 = Flag of the Republic of China.svg | link alias-army = Collaborationist Chinese Army | flag alias-naval = Flag of the Republic of China-Nanjing (War Ensign).svg | link alias-naval = Collaborationist Chinese Army | link alias-air force = Collaborationist Chinese Army | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} | altlink = {{{altlink|}}} | altvar = {{{altvar|}}} <noinclude> | var1 = 1940 | var2 = 1943 | related1 = Republic of China (1912–1949) | related2 = Republic of China | related3 = China </noinclude> }}<noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_Wang_Jingwei_regime here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_Wang_Jingwei_regime for full history.
